#  View Change Orders (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Commitment Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/materials-user-guide-with-financials/create-a-change-order-cco)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the commitment you want to view change orders for.
  3. Tap the change order you wish to view in detail.  
![View Change Order Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/452ca82de9ef799c824298ea487ef823/b8cf8b2ec50fc4393222bced2fd62469/view-change-order-android.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-android)
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android) - SK TEST](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-android-sk-test)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
title: View Change Orders (Android)
description: How to view change orders for a commitment using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
